title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_manager.py (第 330 至 410 行，共 446 行) ---
 330 | 
 331 |         working_max = max(self.working_memory.max_size, 1)
 332 |         episodic_max = max(self.episodic_memory.max_size, 1)
 333 |         return {
 334 |             "enabled": True,
 335 |             "working_memory": {
 336 |                 "size": len(self.working_memory),
 337 |                 "max_size": self.working_memory.max_size,
 338 |                 "usage_rate": len(self.working_memory) / working_max,
 339 |             },
 340 |             "episodic_memory": {
 341 |                 "size": len(self.episodic_memory),
 342 |                 "max_size": self.episodic_memory.max_size,
 343 |                 "usage_rate": len(self.episodic_memory) / episodic_max,
 344 |             },
 345 |             "long_term_memory": {
 346 |                 "count": len(self.long_term_memory),
 347 |                 "summary_count": len(self.long_term_memory.index),
 348 |                 "item_count": len(self.long_term_memory.item_index),
 349 |                 "storage_dir": str(self.long_term_memory.storage_dir),
 350 |             },
 351 |         }
 352 | 
 353 |     def export_memories(self, session_summaries: Optional[List[SessionSummary]] = None, history_summary: str = "") -> Dict[str, Any]:
 354 |         """导出可写入 session 文件的记忆数据。"""
 355 |         session_summaries = session_summaries or []
 356 |         if not self.enabled:
 357 |             return {
 358 |                 "working_memory": [],
 359 |                 "episodic_memory": [],
 360 |                 "memory_items": [],
 361 |                 "session_summaries": [s.to_dict() for s in session_summaries],
 362 |                 "history_summary": history_summary,
 363 |             }
 364 | 
 365 |         return {
 366 |             "working_memory": self.working_memory.get_all(),
 367 |             "episodic_memory": [s.to_dict() for s in self.episodic_memory.get_all()],
 368 |             "memory_items": [item.to_dict() for item in self.long_term_memory.get_all_items()],
 369 |             "session_summaries": [s.to_dict() for s in session_summaries],
 370 |             "history_summary": history_summary,
 371 |         }
 372 | 
 373 |     def import_memories(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 374 |         """
 375 |         导入 session 文件中的记忆数据。
 376 | 
 377 |         返回 Phase 1 兼容字段：history_summary 与 session_summaries。
 378 |         """
 379 |         session_summaries: List[SessionSummary] = []
 380 |         for s_dict in data.get("session_summaries", []):
 381 |             try:
 382 |                 session_summaries.append(SessionSummary.from_dict(s_dict))
 383 |             except Exception as e:
 384 |                 print(f"⚠️ 恢复会话摘要失败: {e}")
 385 | 
 386 |         if self.enabled:
 387 |             self.working_memory.clear()
 388 |             for msg in data.get("working_memory", []):
 389 |                 self.working_memory.add(msg)
 390 | 
 391 |             self.episodic_memory.clear()
 392 |             for s_dict in data.get("episodic_memory", []):
 393 |                 try:
 394 |                     self.episodic_memory.add(SessionSummary.from_dict(s_dict))
 395 |                 except Exception as e:
 396 |                     print(f"⚠️ 恢复情景记忆失败: {e}")
 397 | 
 398 |             for item_dict in data.get("memory_items", []):
 399 |                 try:
 400 |                     self.long_term_memory.store_item(MemoryItem.from_dict(item_dict))
 401 |                 except Exception as e:
 402 |                     print(f"⚠️ 恢复 MemoryItem 失败: {e}")
 403 | 
 404 |         return {
 405 |             "history_summary": data.get("history_summary", ""),
 406 |             "session_summaries": session_summaries,
 407 |         }
 408 | 
 409 |     def export_to_files(self, output_dir: str = "memory/export") -> Dict[str, str]:
 410 |         """导出情景记忆和统计信息到独立文件，返回文件路径。"""
--- 读取完毕 ---
